title: Commit window: P8 Slice A exact bundle
body: Arboreal Ripening Pollen has opened git:index/head claim ca230649-e419-4d39-af3e-59967f15597b and is committing only the five Slice A paths: snapshot.ts, operator-value.ts, text.ts, tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts, tui-text.unit.test.ts. Nebulous controller/app-test files and coordination residue stay out.
